Class ContractPage

java.lang.Object
com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.operations.ContractPage
public class ContractPage extends Object
Screen Controller class for the ContractPage screen Shows all of a contract's details
Version:
2.0 April 7 2025
Author:
Neil Daya, Sania Ghori
